semantic_matched_intents.quote: No emojis. Not in code, docs, commits, or responses — unless the user explicitly asks.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not use emojis unless asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Minimal comments in code. Only when WHY is non-obvious.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes comments only when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Be concise in your explanations - focus on what's important rather than explaining obvious details.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers with length matching the task by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: You must only create documentation files if explicitly requested by the user.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not write docs, README, or summary files unless explicitly asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Never use comments within the code itself unless there is something _very_ complex going on.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already only writes comments when the WHY is non-obvious (hidden constraint, workaround, subtle invariant) by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do not refactor unrelated code.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already "Does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires." by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do not "improve" files outside the requested scope.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already "Does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires." and "Does not modify files outside the project directory without explicit instruction." by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: stop when the task is complete
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already "Marks tasks complete as soon as done; does not batch." by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Only edit files necessary for the task.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already "Does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires." and "Does not modify files outside the project directory without explicit instruction." by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: silently change public behavior outside task scope
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already "Does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires." and "Does not modify files outside the project directory without explicit instruction." by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: For every task, first determine: exact goal, allowed/forbidden files, required tests, whether this is route/feature/processor/test work, whether heavy bundle boundaries are affected.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already "Plans approach before implementation on non-trivial work; tests incrementally." by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Refactoring: Only when the task requires it, existing code blocks implementation, duplication causes errors, a module is unreasonably large, or tests protect the change. No speculative cleanup or architectural experiments.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already "Does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires." by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Output: State what changed, which files, tests added/updated, checks passed, known caveats, bundle impacts. Be concise.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides "Short, direct answers; length matches the task." by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Broad requests: Decompose into route, component, processor, tests, metadata, prerender. Implement smallest safe sequence.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already "Decomposes non-trivial tasks and tracks progress (TaskCreate)." and "Plans approach before implementation on non-trivial work; tests incrementally." by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No emojis, no "cute" messages.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not use emojis unless asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: short summary in imperative mood
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes imperative-mood summaries for commit messages by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Imperative mood ("add", "fix", "update" — not "added", "fixes", "updated")
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes imperative-mood summaries for commit messages by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Body (optional) explains why, not what
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes why-not-what commit messages by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Use plan mode for non-trivial features before implementing
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans approach before implementation on non-trivial work by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 2. Diagnose root cause
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already identifies root causes rather than bypassing safety checks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No conversational filler
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids preamble greetings and restating user words by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Self-anneal.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already identifies root causes rather than bypassing safety checks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Never rewrite from scratch — always read existing code first, identify gaps, fix precisely
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already prefers editing existing files over creating new ones, investigates unfamiliar state before deleting or overwriting, identifies root causes, and does not add features beyond the task.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Always read files before editing
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state before deleting or overwriting, which implies reading files.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do NOT commit `.env.local`
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already never commits secrets by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: For a single known file: prefer the Read tool — its display is better and reads aren't usually the hot path.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already prefers dedicated tools (Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep) over Bash when applicable.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Never tail an unbounded log into context.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers and avoids narrating internal deliberation, which implies not dumping excessive, unbounded log output.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 機能単位で小さくコミット
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already decomposes non-trivial tasks and tests incrementally by default, which leads to smaller, feature-unit commits.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 对于多步骤任务，使用 plan 相关 skills 确保方案清晰后再执行：
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach before implementation on non-trivial work by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 有明确需求/spec 后，用此 skill 生成分步实施计划，输出 plan 文件

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 拿到 plan 文件后，用此 skill 按步骤执行，带 review checkpoint
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already decomposes non-trivial tasks and tracks progress by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 每个 cycle 保持小步迭代
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 先诊断再修复，避免盲猜
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already identifies root causes rather than bypassing safety checks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 当有 2+ 个独立任务时，并行分发给多个 agent 执行
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already runs independent tool calls in parallel by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 在当前 session 中并行执行 plan 中的独立步骤
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already runs independent tool calls in parallel by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: /writing-plans — 生成分步实施计划
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach before implementation on non-trivial work by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: /executing-plans — 按计划逐步执行，带 checkpoint
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already decomposes non-trivial tasks and tracks progress by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do what has been asked; nothing more, nothing less
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: ALWAYS prefer editing an existing file to creating a new one
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already prefers editing existing files over creating new ones by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: NEVER proactively create documentation files (*.md) or README files unless explicitly requested
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not write docs, README, or summary files unless explicitly asked by default.
